claim_boundary: This contract covers only the maintained SkillGuard Global Router entrypoint and local control records. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, installed prompt freshness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.

evidence.summary: Maintained global router entrypoint with required sections.

residual_risk: The contract must be refreshed when global router commands, prompt markers, or registry schema fields change.
